title: The Stages of Sleep
script_summary: Explore the fascinating stages of sleep and their unique roles in our health.

segments.voiceover: Did you know sleep isn’t just resting? It’s a dynamic process!
Your sleep cycles through light, deep, and REM stages. Each plays a crucial role.
Light sleep? It helps you transition into deeper stages. But that’s just the beginning.
Deep sleep is when your body repairs itself, boosting immune function and growth.
And then there’s REM sleep—where dreams happen and memory consolidation kicks in.
Want to unlock better sleep? Follow for more insights on health and biology!
